creator: predius@netzero.net
text:
The laptop has no qualms about booting and running off of the generic kernel from 4.0-Rel and 4.1-Rel.  Any attempt to try later kernels (via the released install floppies) results in the system locking when trying to mount the ramdisk or crashing mid device probing.  It is consistant in how it crashes with each different version, ie 4.4 always hangs mounting the ramdisk after the kernel finishes probing devices.

Mounting root from ufs:/dev/ad0s1a

How-To-Repeat: Use the standard boot floppies from 4.0 or 4.1 to see a clean boot, use any later releases to observe the various failure modes.
